nodes.label: AudioCaptureProcessor Worklet
nodes.rationale: Runs off-main-thread for latency reduction; implements built-in Voice Activity Detection (VAD) to save bandwidth.

nodes.label: MapView Component
nodes.rationale: Holographic geospatial visualization for location-based tool commands.

nodes.label: React Root Entry
nodes.rationale: StrictMode removed to avoid double-mounting which kills active Gemini microphone streams.

nodes.label: useFriday Hook
nodes.rationale: Orchestrates the lifecycle of the AI session, including auth, audio streaming, and tool execution.

nodes.label: LiveSession class
nodes.rationale: Friday persona: sassy, witty, flirty, personality-driven AI inspired by Iron Man's assistant.

nodes.label: AudioStreamer Class
nodes.rationale: Bypasses Chromium's heavy WebRTC DSP pipeline to avoid CPU lag on Windows; uses AudioWorklet for low latency.
